channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: जैसी प्रीति कुटुम्ब की, तैसी हरि सो होय । चला जाय वैकुण्ठ को, पल्ला न पकड़े कोय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: If your love for God was like your love for family, you would reach heaven easily.

Translation: Love God like you love family, and heaven is yours.
item.guid: जैसी प्रीति कुटुम्ब की, तैसी हरि सो होय । चला जाय वैकुण्ठ को, पल्ला न पकड़े कोय ॥493823

item.title: जाति न पूछो साधु की, पूछ लीजिये ज्ञान । मोल करो तलवार का, पड़ा रहन दो म्यान ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Don't ask a saint's caste, ask for his wisdom. Price the sword, leave the sheath.

Translation: Ask wisdom, not caste. Value the sword, not the sheath.
item.guid: जाति न पूछो साधु की, पूछ लीजिये ज्ञान । मोल करो तलवार का, पड़ा रहन दो म्यान ॥493824

item.title: जैसा अन्न वैसा मन, जैसा पानी वैसी बानी ।
item.description:
Meaning: As is the food, so is the mind. As is the water, so is the speech.

Translation: Your mind follows your food. Your speech follows your water.
item.guid: जैसा अन्न वैसा मन, जैसा पानी वैसी बानी ।493825
